name: doubao-image-video-skill
description: Doubao Text-to-Image, Image Editing, and Text-to-Video Generation Skill for Openclaw
author: wenkangwei

action.description: Operation type: img (text-to-image), edit (image editing), vid (text-to-video), status (check task status)

prompt.description: Generation or editing prompt (required for img, edit, and vid actions)

sync_mode.description: Wait mode for video generation: 'sync' (wait for completion), 'async' (return task_id immediately)

image_url.description: Image URL for editing (required for edit action), or reference image for video generation (optional)

task_id.description: Task ID for status checking (required for status action)

ARK_API_KEY.description: Volcengine ARK API Key for authentication

installation.manual: Copy files to Openclaw plugins directory

input.prompt: A cute cat on the beach
